examples: We were ably assisted by a team of volunteers.
He was ably assisted by a number of members from other branches.
Jonathan Fitzgibbons answers these questions ably.
As Josh Wright has ably demonstrated, AAG Barnett and counsel-to-Expedia Barnett have wildly divergent views.
He was ably supported in the four-man bob by Rene Hoppe, Kevin Kuske and Martin Putze.
